description:
Free secure cloud storage

Proton Drive is an end-to-end encrypted Swiss vault for your files that protects your data.
Improvements
- Photo import reuses equally named albums instead of creating duplicates
Bug Fixes
- Fixed false sync error when a folder with successfully imported photos is missing
- Resolved conflicts when folder syncs to both Proton Drive and Google Drive
- Fixed slow sync startup on every app launch affecting some users
